props.name: colors
props.description: Colors used for staggered underlay layers.

props.name: items
props.description: Menu items rendered inside the panel.

props.name: socialItems
props.description: Social links displayed in the menu panel.

props.name: displaySocials
props.description: Whether to display the social links section.

props.name: displayItemNumbering
props.description: Whether to show numbering for menu items.

props.name: menuButtonColor
props.description: Color of the menu toggle button when closed.

props.name: openMenuButtonColor
props.description: Color of the menu toggle button when open.

props.name: accentColor
props.description: Hover accent color for menu items.

props.name: changeMenuColorOnOpen
props.description: Whether to animate the button color when opening/closing.

props.name: onMenuOpen
props.description: Callback function called when menu opens.

props.name: onMenuClose
props.description: Callback function called when menu closes.

props.name: closeOnClickAway
props.description: Whether to close the menu when clicking outside.
